query: WITH RECURSIVE closure AS ( SELECT d.requires_slug, d.version_range, 1 AS depth FROM skill_dependencies d WHERE d.tenant_id = $1 AND d.parent_skill_id = $2 UNION SELECT d.requires_slug, d.version_range, c.depth + 1 FROM skill_dependencies d JOIN skills s ON s.id = d.parent_skill_id AND s.tenant_id = $1 JOIN closure c ON s.slug = c.requires_slug WHERE c.depth < 10 ) SELECT requires_slug AS slug, version_range, depth FROM closure ORDER BY depth ASC, slug ASC
